body: you are my favorite lady. the prettiest girl. i love you so much and i miss you already. 🦉
i love laying in your bed, this wifi jumping so bad
you are a smart lady. i’m sorry that i can’t help you today. i love and miss you. good luck on your exam my girl.
just woke up for a bit and I’m thinking about how I’ve been able to be very vulnerable with you. thank you for holding me gently <3
this song always feels like you to me, i love it and you
guess where i am from this photo 😭
i gotta listen to my wife more often fr
we're on the phone right now. i miss you. i don't want you to go to work :( i love you, my sweet girl.
all the days i relished in my solitude, i never imagined i could prefer your company in place of it.
you are the prettiest girl in the whole world.
i miss you. i wish i was taking a nap with my sweet girl.
you are the smartest woman i know. i know you'll do well on your exam. i love you. ♥
you are the most important person to me in any room.
you push me to be a better person. i'm so lucky to be a part of your life. 🌷
